nodes.title: Load Style Anchor Or Same Reference

widgets_values: Create a painterly isometric tactical RPG sprite-source proof sheet for this exact character, hybrid Final Fantasy Tactics tone with a softer and friendlier edge, slightly cute adult proportions around a 1 to 4.75 head to body ratio, soft facial planes, readable hands, readable weapon silhouette, grounded medieval-fantasy materials, not super-deformed, not hyper-grim, no gore, no photoreal skin, no modern elements, use a flat solid chroma magenta background using exact #FF00FF with zero gradients and keep that exact color out of the subject, keep the full body and both feet visible in every panel, keep the same centered foot anchor and overall scale in every panel, no labels, no text, no watermark, no borders, no environment scene, arrange the sheet as a 2 by 2 grid with equal full-body panels, panel 1 top-left: neutral ready pose, panel 2 top-right: weapon-ready combat pose, panel 3 bottom-left: first step of a walk or advance with stable foot anchor, panel 4 bottom-right: cast-ready or skill-ready pose depending on the character weapon type, prioritize silhouette approval, costume stability, palette stability, and approachable but not childish tone

You are an expert image-generation engine. You must ALWAYS produce an image. Follow panel order literally. Preserve the exact same character identity, costume, palette, weapon, proportions, and foot anchor across every panel. Treat every provided reference image as binding identity input. Never add labels, captions, borders, numbers, UI, or watermarks.
